summary: Iteration 148: Bug Fixes Verified - All 3 reported bugs fixed. 1) Online platforms now showing in POS page (tenant filter fix). 2) Supplier credit calculation working correctly (tenant filter in aggregation pipelines). 3) Credit payment mode no longer double-updates balance (removed redundant update). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All bug fixes verified via Playwright.

issues: Console hydration warning for span/tr nesting - minor React DOM issue, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Bug #1 Fixed: platforms.py lines 28-37 - Added tenant filter (tf) to sales and platform_payments sub-queries in get_platforms()
Bug #2 Fixed: suppliers.py lines 23-44 - Added get_tenant_filter() to all aggregation pipelines for credit calculation
Bug #2 Fixed: suppliers.py line 177 - Added tenant filter to get_supplier_payments query
Bug #3 Fixed: suppliers.py - Removed double-credit-update from create_supplier_payment (credit mode no longer updates stored balance)
Bug #3 Fixed: suppliers.py - Only POST /expenses with payment_mode=credit should increase supplier credit balance
Recalculate endpoint (suppliers.py lines 70-101) correctly uses tenant filter for all queries
seed_data_creation: Test payments created during backend tests with TEST_ITER148 prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 148 verified 3 bug fixes for SSC Track ERP: (1) GET /api/platforms now returns all 11 delivery platforms with correct tenant isolation - platforms visible in POS /pos Online Sales tab. (2) GET /api/suppliers returns correct current_credit calculated dynamically with tenant filter. (3) POST /api/supplier-payments with payment_mode=credit no longer updates stored credit - only POST /api/expenses with credit mode increases balance. Supplier balance corrected from 439.50 to 0.00 after recalculate.

bug_1_platforms_not_showing.description: Online Sale platforms not showing in Quick Entry POS page
bug_1_platforms_not_showing.root_cause: Missing tenant_id filter in sales and platform_payments sub-queries
bug_1_platforms_not_showing.verification: 10+ platforms now visible in POS page Online Sales tab (HungerStation, Jahez, ToYou, Keta, Ninja, Careem Food, Talabat, Marsool, Other)

bug_2_supplier_credit_issues.description: Supplier/Supplier Payment page issues - credit calculation wrong
bug_2_supplier_credit_issues.root_cause: Missing tenant filter in aggregation pipelines for credit/payment calculation
bug_2_supplier_credit_issues.verification: GET /api/suppliers returns correct current_credit, GET /api/supplier-payments returns tenant-filtered records

bug_3_credit_paid_display.description: Quick Entry when adding supplier as credit payment it shows as 'credit paid'
bug_3_credit_paid_display.root_cause: Double-credit-update bug - POST /supplier-payments was updating stored credit incorrectly
bug_3_credit_paid_display.fix_location: /app/backend/routers/suppliers.py - Removed lines 227-229 that were double-updating credit
bug_3_credit_paid_display.verification: Credit mode supplier payments no longer update stored balance - only expenses with credit mode do

frontend_playwright: Online Sales tab shows platforms (HungerStation, Jahez, ToYou, Keta, Ninja, Careem, Talabat, Marsool) - PASS
Add Bills tab visible with credit/cash/bank payment modes - PASS
Payments table shows 6 records with correct payment modes - PASS
Add Bill button opens form with credit mode option - PASS
Suppliers page /suppliers shows credit status correctly - PASS
